rationale: Hypothesizes that a sudden spike in Utilities relative to Tech predicts a delayed structural tech selloff.
expected_failure_mode: Yield-seeking behavior may drive Utilities up independently of Tech fundamentals, causing premature exits.
stop_conditions: no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Correlation between Utilities spikes and Tech drops is below 0.3 over a 10-year span.
Generates excessive portfolio churn over 20 signals per year.
